name: ARILControlPDU
title: ARILControlPDU
syntax: long ARILControlPDU (dbMsg, dword Control, dword Flags, dword Param1, dword Param2)
description: Sets/activates/deactivates a special feature/action for a dedicated PDU.

parameters.name: dbMsg
parameters.description: The symbolic name of a PDU in the database.

parameters.name: Control
parameters.description: Determines the action/setting to be applied.

parameters.name: Flags
parameters.description: Flags that can be applied to the action/setting.
Reserved (should be set to 0) Reserved (should be set to 0) Reserved (should be set to 0) Enable PDU: corresponds to call of ARILFaultInjectionEnablePDU
Reserved (should be set to 0) Reserved (should be set to 0) Reserved (should be set to 0) Disable PDU: corresponds to call of ARILFaultInjectionDisablePDU

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
